description_long: This is a wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape and reinforced by two wide, black metal hoops encircling its body. The wood staves are vertically aligned and have a natural, medium-brown finish, giving the barrel a rustic appearance. Bold black text reading 'KEEP OUT' is stenciled across the front and side, suggesting it is used for warning or restricting access. The top and bottom are flat and appear to be made of the same wood as the sides, with no visible openings or handles. The surface texture is matte with visible wood grain, and the metal bands add structural integrity. This barrel would be commonly found in urban or semi-industrial outdoor settings, possibly as a prop or for storage.
description: A wooden barrel with black metal hoops and 'KEEP OUT' stenciled on the side, featuring a rustic, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'KEEP OUT' text clearly across the center and lower metal hoops.
description_view_1: Side view with only part of the 'KEEP OUT' text visible, emphasizing the curvature and banding.
description_view_2: Angled view similar to the front, with the 'KEEP OUT' text partially visible and both hoops in view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only the edge of the 'KEEP OUT' text visible, focusing on the wood and metal bands.
